recommendations.title: Bobby Fischer Against the World
recommendations.overview: The first documentary feature to explore the tragic and bizarre life of the late chess master Bobby Fischer.

recommendations.title: Searching for Bobby Fischer
recommendations.overview: A seven-year-old chess prodigy refuses to harden himself in order to become a champion like the famous but unlikable Bobby Fischer.

recommendations.title: Squid Game: Making Season 2
recommendations.overview: From set designs to character arcs, get exclusive cast and director interviews on how Season 2 of the globally most-watched series was brought to life.

recommendations.title: No Half Measures: Creating the Final Season of Breaking Bad
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the making of season five of the acclaimed AMC series Breaking Bad.

recommendations.title: Demi Lovato: Simply Complicated
recommendations.overview: A personal and intimate look into Demi Lovato's life as not only a regular 25 year old, but also one of the biggest pop stars in the world.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: The Greatest Night in Pop
recommendations.overview: On a January night in 1985, music's biggest stars gathered to record "We Are the World." This documentary goes behind the scenes of the historic event.

recommendations.title: Inside the Mind of a Cat
recommendations.overview: Cat experts dive into the mind of the feline to reveal the true capabilities of the pouncing pet in this captivating and cuddly documentary.

recommendations.title: The Making of The Walking Dead
recommendations.overview: The Making of the TV Series The Walking Dead.

recommendations.title: Rubius X
